productDisplayName: Nike Men FFF N98 Red Jacket
description: CompositionRed track jacket made of 53% polyester and 47% cotton, black tipped ribbing around neckline and cuffs made of 99% polyester and 1% spandex, zippered closure on the front, black piping along the back and sleeves, white panel detailing from neckline to shoulders, two insert pockets on the front with zippered closures, embroidered swoosh logo on the right chest, appliqued FFF badge on the left chest and the word 'France' on the centre back FittingRegularWash care Machine wash cold Wash with like colours Do not use softeners Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Do not bleach Line dry Do not iron Do not dry clean Stylish to the T, this red track jacket from nike with looks stylish on the track and off it. The bold red colour and the French football Federation badge on the left chest gives a great burst of energy to the tee. Team it with tracks, tees and performance shoes for workouts and training sessions or team it with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.
